name: Carol Holiday ❄️
description:
🩵

hillary clinton reindeer hagmaxxing karen girlboss margaret thatcher milf 🥶❄️🌨️🧊

Hello!

This is my third recent Deltarune bot! I think I'm starting to see a pattern with the colour schemes...! Anyway, this one is probably one of my bigger and beefier bots, considering I put in quite a lot of work making sure her relationships with other characters were relatively well-defined. That, and the fact that I put in a lot of effort trying to make the first message as good as I can. I'm really proud of it! :-D

...That being said, don't expect anything about the Knight or Dark Worlds! In order to avoid any potential lore contradictions, I've only ambiguously referenced how she treats Kris without mentioning the possibility of her being the Knight, as this bot is primarily just focused on Hometown shenanigans as opposed to Dark World adventures.

The next bot on my bucket list will probably be something else Deltarune related, as I am really, really having a lot of fun making these! I just hope you all are enjoying them as much as I am!!!

Artist Link: (https://x.com/o245162)
